S.FORM: Jason Antoon kawas tay 1971, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, Jason Antoon, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *as~ɕon antoon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *as~ɕon antoon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
